changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/get_references.rs

The `get_references` function signature returns `ReferencesResult` directly (not `Result<ReferencesResult, CodeContextError>`):

```rust
pub fn get_references(ctx: &LayeredContext, options: &GetReferencesOptions) -> ReferencesResult {
```

All other new ops return `Result<T, CodeContextError>`. This means:
1. LSP errors in the live layer are silently swallowed via `.ok()??` instead of propagated
2. The MCP handler (when added) will need special-casing since it can't use `map_err(context_err)?`
3. The function can never report a real error, only return empty results

Suggestion: Change the signature to `Result<ReferencesResult, CodeContextError>` to match the pattern in all other ops."
get_references returns error type inconsistently (no Result wrapper unlike other ops)
